paper_record.title: Moiré Mott correlated mosaics in twisted bilayer 1T-TaS$_2$
paper_record.abstract: The tunability and twist engineering of van der Waals materials enable the emergence of electronic states not present in individual monolayers. Among them, monolayer 1T-TaS$_2$ is a well-known Mott insulating system, whose star-of-David charge density wave reconstruction realizes an emergent triangular lattice of local magnetic moments. Interestingly, in its bulk form, the insulating gap is not correlation-driven, but stems from interlayer coupling. Here, we exploit the stacking-dependent nature of the insulating gap to show that in twisted 1T-TaS$_2$ bilayers, the spatially dependent competition between many-body and single-particle gaps creates Mott-trivial mosaic superlattices, featuring regions with local magnetic moments and non-magnetic insulating regions. We further demonstrate the tunability of the mosaic correlated state with an interlayer bias, giving rise to controllable charge transfer and quenching of correlations. Our results establish twisted 1T-TaS$_2$ as a flexible platform to engineer mixed spatially modulated correlated insulating phases, arising from the moiré profile.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 研究揭示了转角双层 1T-TaS2 中由多体 Mott 间隙与单粒子杂化间隙构成的莫尔马赛克结构。
one_sentence_summary.en: The study reveals a moiré mosaic of many-body Mott gaps and single-particle hybridization gaps in twisted bilayer 1T-TaS2.

problem.zh: 探索在转角 1T-TaS2 中，单层固有的 Mott 关联与层间耦合导致的杂化间隙如何随空间位置竞争并演化。
problem.en: To explore the spatial competition between the intrinsic Mott correlations of monolayers and the hybridization gaps driven by interlayer coupling in twisted 1T-TaS2.

approach.zh: 采用基于大卫之星电荷密度波单元的 Wannier 轨道 Hubbard 模型，结合非共线平均场方法，模拟不同转角和层间偏压下的电子结构。
approach.en: A Hubbard model based on Wannier orbitals of the star-of-David CDW unit is used with non-collinear mean-field theory to simulate electronic structures under various twist angles and interlayer biases.

main_takeaway.zh: 莫尔超晶格诱导了空间调制的马赛克相：局部区域表现为带磁矩的 Mott 绝缘体，而其他区域则因强层间耦合变为非磁性平凡绝缘体，且这种状态可通过电场调控。
main_takeaway.en: The moiré superlattice induces a spatially modulated mosaic phase where some regions are magnetic Mott insulators while others become non-magnetic trivial insulators due to strong interlayer coupling, all tunable via electric fields.

why_it_matters.zh: 该研究为在范德华材料中通过转角工程实现混合关联相提供了新平台，并为寻找量子自旋液体等奇异磁性态开辟了路径。
why_it_matters.en: This work establishes a new platform for engineering mixed correlated phases via twist engineering in van der Waals materials and opens pathways for searching for exotic magnetic states like quantum spin liquids.

reason.zh: 首次系统阐述了转角 1T-TaS2 中两种绝缘机制的空间竞争，并提出了可调控的关联马赛克概念。
reason.en: It provides the first systematic description of the spatial competition between two insulating mechanisms in twisted 1T-TaS2 and proposes the concept of a tunable correlated mosaic.

reason.zh: 该研究结合了热门的莫尔物理与经典的 Mott 绝缘体体系，具有很强的物理启发性。
reason.en: The study combines hot topics in moiré physics with classic Mott insulator systems, offering significant physical insights.
